calendar.matters:
Motion To Vacate
Off Calendar Feb-02-2011 Granted Per Written Order

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-01-2010 Dismissal - No Appearance

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-12-2010 Continued To Oct-25-10 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 306

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2010 Set For Trial On Jun-03-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 306

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-03-2010 Continued To Jun-03-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-04-2010 Continued To Jul-12-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 306
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
MS. RAQUEL FOX, counsel for plaintiff, Ms. Elizabeth Nicholas, Certified Law Student; Ms. Sandra Ippolito, Ms. Chris Courtney and Shannon Rice, plaintiffs. MR.STEVEN ADAIR MACDONALD, counsel for defendant; and Ms. Margie Chung, defendant.

Counsel and all parties agreed to consolidate both cases for purposes of trial in light of the fact that the majority of the issues of fact are similar.

After Opening Statements Plaintiff/Respondent Ippolito made a motion to amend her complaint to add a complaint to recover $200 for the replacement of the door in her apartment. Counsel had no good cause for the late motion. The court excercised its discretion to grant the motion on condition the trial be continued to allow defendant to prepare for the additional complaint

All parties were ordered to return to Dept 206 AT 1:30 today to reschedule the court trial.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-22-2010 Continued To Jun-03-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 10:01am
Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, clerk-beth wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. Respondent, Sandra Ippolito, appears in Pro Per; Appellant Margie Chung, appears through counsel, Steven Adair MacDonald. Mr. MacDonald represents to the Court that all parties wish to stipulate to continue the matter. Respondents want to find an attorney. For Good Cause the Court will continue the matter to June 3, 2010, 9am.
10:05am
Matter is submitted. No new evidence is identified or retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-02-2010 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-14-2010 Continued To Feb-19-10 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506
